Meta.title: Web Cursor · AI React Playground
Meta.description: An in-browser AI React coding sandbox: describe an interface, generate React code, run it instantly, and feed runtime results back to the agent loop for self-repair.

ProjectHome.title: My projects
ProjectHome.description: Each project stores one codebase. Multiple conversation threads in a project share the current code.
ProjectHome.openProject: Open the project to view conversation history and the latest code

Workbench.emptyHistory: This project has no conversation history yet. Type below to create one lazily.

Chat.title: AI chat · Agent
Chat.emptyTitle: Describe the React UI you want
Chat.emptyDescription: I will write code, run it, and repair it if the preview fails.

Agent.filesUpdatedPreviewFailed: Files updated, but preview failed and was not fed back to the AI
Agent.filesUpdatedNoResult: Files updated, but the preview returned no result
Agent.missingConversation: Missing conversation or project information; cannot write preview result.
Agent.previewErrorFixing: AI is fixing the preview error…
Agent.resumeLimit: Browser tool resume limit exceeded after {max} rounds.

Composer.placeholder: Describe the interface you want… You can also paste or drop screenshots
Composer.uploadHelp: Upload PNG / JPEG / WebP images. Paste and drag-and-drop are also supported.
Composer.tooMany: You can upload up to {max} images.
Composer.onlyImages: Only PNG, JPEG, and WebP images are supported.
Composer.aggregateError: Some images failed to upload. Remove or retry them before sending.

Editor.emptyFiles: No files yet. Files will appear here after the AI writes them or you create one manually.

Preview.title: Preview
Preview.empty: Preview will appear here after generation
Preview.completeProjectFirst: Preview is available after a complete React project is generated
Preview.selectConversation: Select a conversation or continue typing

Figma.checkingDetail: Reading the current owner's Figma authorization status.
Figma.connectedDetail: You can continue reading this design link.
Figma.disconnectedDetail: Connect Figma so the agent can read the frame link you provide.
Figma.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the Figma authorization popup. Allow popups and try again.

FigmaCallback.successDescription: Authorization is complete. This window will close automatically, then you can continue in Web Cursor.
FigmaCallback.errorDescription: The authorization flow did not complete. Close this window and try again.
